content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with Nifty -1.12%, IT in freefall (-4.82%), VIX spiking 3.34% to 19.21. Book already 67% deployed with net unrealized loss today. Defensive rotation into FMCG/pharma visible but FII/DII data blank suggests noisy tape. Priority is position management, not new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 5.8% on the session but SL at 75.00 not yet breached (CMP 76.77). Thesis intact — Q4 FY26 net profit +35% YoY, HDFC Sec target Rs 90. Recent parabolic move from 64 to 82 is unwinding; holding current SL gives thesis room. No MODIFY because current SL already at prior support cluster."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1011.65,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position up +3.8%. Current SL 1011.65 is already slightly below CMP 1024.50 and above entry 984 — this is effectively a breakeven-plus trail. No change needed; values identical to current. Converting to HOLD in position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "ETF at -1.1%, consolidating. Geopolitical risk backdrop + VIX rising supports hedge thesis. SL at 119 gives adequate room. No trail warranted yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position flat at +0.1%. Current SL at entry (1412.94) is already breakeven. Stock near 52W high post Q4 beat. Broker targets cluster at 1400-1500 — limited near-term upside. Keep SL at breakeven; defensive anchor in selloff."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%. Q4 results April 27 — binary event risk in 3 days. Keep SL at 1035 (below entry 1049 by 1.3%, risk under 0.25% of portfolio). Universal bank approval structurally positive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7%. SL at 678 is just below entry. Q4 earnings Apr 29 — 5 days out, stock near 52W high, stretched into event. Tight SL is the correct posture; not worth trailing further with unrealized gain this small."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.4%, CMP 2302 vs SL 2260. Stock broke down today -2.72% after two-day rally. Approaching SL with ~1.8% buffer. Thesis (Q4 Apr 30, FMCG defensive) intact but price action deteriorating. Hold SL where it is — do not widen; exit if 2260 breached."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%. SL at 393 gives ~2% buffer. Q4 results May 15. Summer peak demand catalyst intact. No change warranted."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 75 still intact; giving thesis room through PSU bank weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed above entry; further trail premature at +3.8%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry = breakeven already set."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-earnings; tight SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL near entry; pre-earnings posture."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater but SL 2260 acceptable. Will exit on stop hit, not widen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Within normal noise; SL adequate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS showed strong relative strength post Q4 (+31% PAT, Rs 270 dividend) but stock already +8.9% on Apr 23 — chasing into a spike on a weak tape is poor R:R. ABSLAMC saw vol surge but intraday showed 1099 spike rejected to 1060 — distribution signature, avoid. CLEAN volume surge is likely block deal distribution given 12-month -36% and stock near BB upper band; stay away. BRITANNIA Q4 on Apr 28 — wait for print. NMDC near 52W high but metal sector weak today; no edge. Revisit OFSS/ABSLAMC if they base for 2-3 sessions.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 67% deployed, cash 32% — within policy. Daily unrealized -0.24%, well within loss limit. 8 positions already; diversified across PSU bank, HFC, gold ETF, FMCG (2x — NESTLE+HUL, ~3.5% capital, fine), private bank, pharma/healthcare, energy. No cluster breach. Per deployment hysteresis rule: book >60% deployed with net-flat session = default NO_ACTION on new entries. Today's focus is letting existing positions either prove themselves or stop out cleanly. Multiple earnings events in next 5-7 days (AUBANK Apr 27, BRITANNIA Apr 28, GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30) — binary event concentration is already high; adding more pre-earnings names would be reckless."
}
